prompt_INIT_CONFIG_HERE_ANYWAY.message: Go simolola faele ya config fano lefa go ntse jalo

prompt_KEYS_TO_IGNORE.message: Tsenya senotlolo(di) go itlhokomolosa (se se kgaogantsweng le koma, kgotsa tsenya fa se feditswe)

log_OVERWRITING_CONFIG_AT.message: Go kwala mo godimo ga tumalano e e leng teng kwa

log_DEFAULT_CONFIG_CREATED_AT.message: Configuration e e tlhamilweng ka tsela e e tlwaelegileng

log_NO_NEW_KEYS_ADDED.message: Ga go na dilotlolo dipe tse diswa tse di tsentsweng (tsotlhe tse di setseng di le teng

log_ALL_JSON_UPDATED.message: Difaele tsotlhe tsa JSON di ntshwafaditswe ka katlego

log_TO_CREATE_DEFAULT_CONFIG.message: go dira faele ya default config

log_FOR_AVAIL_OPTIONS.message: mo dilong tse o ka tlhophang mo go tsone

tip_FOR_MORE_HELP_VISIT.message: Go bona thuso go ya pele, etela

tip_MOVE_CONFIG_TO_ROOT.message: Sutisetsa faele ya CONFINCE kwa moding wa porojeke e o batlang go e dirisa mo go yone

tip_IT_HAS_VALID_JSON.message: e na le JSON ya boammaaruri

warn_CONFIG_EXISTS_AT.message: Config e setse e le teng kwa

warn_DIR_NOT_FOUND.message: Ga ke kgone go bona kaedi

warn_NO_PROJECT_ROOT_FOUND_IN.message: Ga go a bonwa modi ope wa porojeke mo

warn_NO_LONGER_HAS_ANY_EFFECT.message: ga e tlhole e na le diphelelo dipe

err_PARSE_FAILED.message: O paletswe ke go e kgaoganya

err_EN_LOC_NOT_FOUND_AT.message: Lefelo la Seesemane le le sa bonweng kwa

help_LOCALES_DIR.message: Leina la folda e e nang le difaele tsa lefelo (default: "_locales")

help_TARGET_LANGS.message: Dipuo tse go ka ranolelwang mo go tsone (ka sekai, "es,fr") (default: all 100+ supported locales)

help_KEYS.message: Dilotlolo tsa go ranola (ka sekai, "APP_DESC,err_NOT_Found") (thulaganyo: dilotlolo tsotlhe tsa src tse di bonweng di tlhaela mo difaeleng tse di lebeletsweng)

help_EXCLUDE_LANGS.message: Dipuo tse go sa akarediwang mo go tsone (ka sekai, "es, zh")

help_ONLY_STABLE.message: Dirisa mafelo a a tsepameng fela (skip auto-discovery)

help_CONFIG.message: Dirisa faele ya custom config (ka sekai, "PATH/to/file")

help_INIT.message: Create .translate-msgs.config.json5 file to store default options

help_FORCE.message: Pateletsa go tlosa faele e e leng teng ya config fa o dirisa Init

help_NO_WIZARD.message: Tlola dikgakololo tse di rotloetsang batho go dirisana mmogo ka nako ya go simolola
